specific_question: What was the customer retention rate for Elexion Automotive owners who reported excellent infotainment system performance as opposed to those who reported connectivity problems?
answer: A 2023 owner satisfaction study conducted in September revealed a 94% retention rate among customers who reported excellent infotainment system performance, compared to only 71% retention among those who experienced repeated connectivity problems.
dr_question: How can Elexion Automotive's quality assurance testing protocols prioritize Apple CarPlay and Android Auto connectivity performance by Q4 2025 for 2026 EV models to differentiate from competitors and attract 50% of Apple users and 42% of Samsung users who depend on smartphone connections every drive?
